plan.annotation: Markers placed on 1–5 likelihood and impact scales from the Q2 risk register.

operations.label: Three editable risk markers
operations.value: Pipeline coverage 4/5; implementation capacity 3/4; retention concentration 2/5

operations.label: Priority zone highlighting
operations.value: High likelihood–impact zone emphasizes pipeline coverage as highest priority

plan.pptxFallback: PowerPoint fallback uses editable axes, zones, and markers; a bar chart or linear stack fails artifact-type matching.
plan.takeaway: Pipeline coverage is highest priority; retention concentration and implementation capacity follow.
